title: stachys ocymastrum subsp. bicolor
intro: Stachys ocymastrum subsp. bicolor, also known as two-colored woundwort or mountain betony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stachys ocymastrum subsp. bicolor include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
